subject: Mathematics
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the concept of congruence in daily life
Identify congruent line segments and angles
Understand the symbol and notation for congruence
Relate congruence to the idea of superimposition
Recognize congruent plane figures like circles and squares

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Congruence
topics_covered: Meaning of congruence (same shape and size)
Examples from nature and industry (leaves, biscuits, stamps)
student_activities: Trace two identical coins and compare
Find objects in the classroom that cover each other exactly
assessment: Oral identification of congruent vs non-congruent pairs

lesson_plan.title: Congruence of Line Segments and Angles
topics_covered: Condition for congruence of lines (equal length)
Condition for congruence of angles (equal measure)
student_activities: Measure and identify congruent segments from a given set
Draw two angles of 45° and verify congruence by cutting and overlaying

teaching_aids: Identical sets of objects (biscuits, playing cards)
teacher_tip: Use the 'photocopy' analogy—congruent figures are like multiple copies of the same photo.
